---
title: "Multiple Rater Research"
---

## Overview

Skip Krueger, I, and co-authors published a series of papers conceptualizing default risk as a multiple rater problem including the papers by  @krueger2010management, @krueger2010boosterism, 
@walker2009splitratings, and @krueger2008bondratings.

@sinclairchapman2009participation examines political participation in this light.  @maltz2024biosocial used this to explore a key measure.  Current work with Ashley Nixon and co-authors uses these and related techniques for capturing work stress.


## Data & Code

All research materials, including data and replication code, are available on my [GitHub](https://github.com/robertwwalker).

I am committed to computational reproducibility and open science. Most projects include:

- Documented R/Python code
- Data (when not restricted)
- Quarto/RMarkdown analysis notebooks
- Instructions for replication
